data.name: Fate and Life: The Mystery of Vaulinhorn
data.detailed_description:
The game currently contains:

-6,013 4k quality renders

-214 animations (It contains 20,162 4k renders)

-51 choices

-6 looping animations

-10 Unreal Engine 5 Cinematic Videos (It contains 64,347 4k renders)

-So in total this game has 6,013+64,347+20,162 = 90,522 4k renders

-221k Words

-84 Background Music

-257 Voice Narrated Lines

The Story:

In the city of Vaulinhorn, a series of bizarre and inexplicable events have left the community reeling. Once vibrant and bustling, Vaulinhorn now stands shrouded in secrecy and fear, as residents have been mysteriously vanishing without a trace. As the player, you are thrust into this perplexing world, tasked with unraveling the enigma and restoring peace to the tormented citizens.

Fate and Life: The Mystery of Vaulinhorn is a narrative-driven game, melding the themes of fate, life, and mystery. As you embark on this journey, you will witness the delicate interplay of destiny and existence, shaping the characters' lives through the choices you make. Each decision carries the weight of consequence, leading to a plethora of possible endings and ensuring that every playthrough is fresh and compelling.

As the player delves further into the intricate world of Vaulinhorn, they will discover that sensuality is an integral component of the experience.

hroughout the game, players will be presented with an array of tantalizing opportunities to engage in steamy interactions with various characters. These encounters are not only thrilling but also serve to enrich the player's understanding of the characters' desires, fears, and motivations. As players navigate the fine balance between deciphering Vaulinhorn's mysteries and indulging in the sensual pleasures that await them, they will find that these elements are inextricably linked.

Fate and Life: The Mystery of Vaulinhorn provides a unique and immersive experience that will leave players eager to uncover every secret and replay scenes to experience the path of each decision. As you traverse the town's shadowed streets, will you find solace in the arms of its enigmatic inhabitants? The choice is yours, and the future of Vaulinhorn hangs in the balance.

data.short_description: Fate and Life: The Mystery of Vaulinhorn is a visual novel game set in an enigmatic city rife with mystery and lust. Navigate the intertwining paths of fate and desire, unearth the haunting secrets of Vaulinhorn, and revel in the thrill of its sensual encounters.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 土耳其文
data.reviews:
“This game masterfully weaves together a captivating narrative, sexual interactions, and stunning visuals to deliver an exciting gaming experience. If you're open to a narrative with meaningful choices and appreciate the allure of mystery and sexual desires, this game is sure to leave you utterly fascinated. Dive into the shadows of Vaulinhorn, and decide the fate of its enigmatic inhabitants; the journey is yours to explore!”
Steam

“Great story told well, super hot situations and super hot renders. Rare to find all these in one VN.”
Steam

“Played this game and I can say it is totally worth it, it has a lot of content and a lot of REALLY GOOD CONTENT. Really good work from the dev and I can't wait to see how the game progresses 10/10 would recommend”
Steam

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
